chapter_title.en: Reward of selecting a good burial shroud and shrouding it appropriately

text: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِیسَی یَرْفَعُهُ إِلَی أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: أَجِیدُوا أَکْفَانَ مَوْتَاکُمْ فَإِنَّهَا زِینَتُهُمْ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Yahya from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Ahmad b. Muhammad b. Isa who raised it to Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Arrange for a good burial shroud for the dead among you and shroud them well for the shroud is the only embellishment for them.”
